subject: [SO] Bump container versions
commit_message:
[SO] Bump container versions

Bump some containers to 1.7.8

Issue-ID: SO-3216
Change-Id: Ie19abbb130282332becbafb4fffddd35d6fdc166
Signed-off-by: Kalkere Ramesh, Sharan <sk720x@att.com>
